=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:13-6:26) TS377071: This Effect code uses `Math.random()`, randomness is represented through the Effect `Random` service. effect(globalRandomInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalRandomInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalRandomInEffect for entire file"
